landing.title: Afenda ERP Platform
landing.subtitle: Run finance, events, and partner workflows from one tenant-aware workspace—built for operators who need clarity at scale.
landing.feature_1: Navigate enabled modules with shell chrome that stays consistent from overview to detail.
landing.feature_2: Use breadcrumbs and structure that stay audit-friendly as your footprint grows.
landing.feature_3: Jump into the workspace today—formal authentication flows arrive incrementally.
landing.placeholder_primary: Use this area for product messaging, pricing, and onboarding flows.

register.error_generic: Could not create your account. Try again.

forgot_password.title: Reset password
forgot_password.description: Enter your email address. If an account exists, we will send reset instructions.
forgot_password.success: If an account exists for that email, you will receive reset instructions shortly.
forgot_password.error_generic: Could not start password reset. Try again.

reset_password.title: Choose a new password
reset_password.error_token: This reset link is missing, invalid, or expired.
reset_password.error_generic: Could not reset your password. Try again.

token_playground.title: Design token playground
token_playground.subtitle: Live reference for `index.css`: theme variables, registered `@utility` classes, and the components layer—shown next to primitives that consume the same tokens.
token_playground.section_semantic_hint: Foreground tokens render as text; border and input as strokes; ring previews combine `--color-ring` and `--color-ring-offset`.
token_playground.utility_focus_note: Use a native button so the `focus-ring` utility is not overridden by component focus styles.
token_playground.contract_intro: Use this matrix when tightening contracts: theme files own values; `index.css` exposes utilities and component-layer classes; primitives map Tailwind semantic classes to the same CSS variables.
token_playground.shell_note: `ui-shell-header-strip` uses the same semantic border/background tokens as the rest of the shell.
token_playground.theme_cycle_aria: Cycle appearance: light, dark, then system preference
token_playground.card_primitives_description: Primitives use Tailwind semantic utilities (`bg-primary`, `text-muted-foreground`) that compile to the same `--color-*` variables as this page.

index_css.title: index.css vocabulary
index_css.description: Approved utilities from `index.css`: layout stacks, shell chrome, component-layer classes, and Tailwind plugins—using the same semantic tokens as the token playground below.
index_css.capability_theme_body: Canonical CSS imports: light tokens, dark overrides, layout, density, and shadcn-compat aliases—no ad hoc color in feature CSS.
index_css.capability_layers_body: Frame vocabulary (`ui-shell-*`, `ui-stack-*`, `ui-page`) matches ERP shell routes and responsive spacing tokens.
index_css.group_layout_hint: Page width, vertical rhythm, and section headers use spacing and container tokens.
index_css.sample_lede: Intro copy uses `ui-lede` and muted foreground for hierarchy.
index_css.group_typography_hint: Hero, page, section titles and lede align with `theme-tokens-layout` text tokens.
index_css.group_shell_hint: Header strip, slot top, sidebar brand, content, and footer slot mirror the app shell contract.
index_css.shell_content_sample: Main region uses `ui-shell-content`: panel padding and background tokens for long-form work.
index_css.group_utilities_hint: Hairline, keyboard focus ring, and marketing gradient—token-driven, no hardcoded colors.
index_css.group_components_hint: `ui-field` and `ui-table` bind to `--color-input`, table stripes, and code surfaces.
index_css.group_responsive_hint: Marketing utilities scale at `md` and `lg` breakpoints (see `index.css` media queries).
index_css.group_tooling_hint: Plugins and animation entry registered once in `index.css`.
index_css.tooling_body: Tailwind v4 with `@tailwindcss/forms` (class strategy), `@tailwindcss/typography`, and `tw-animate-css`. Dark mode uses `html.dark` via next-themes.

auth_security.shell_subtitle: Adaptive command-center authentication with explainable trust and challenge continuity.
auth_security.register_subtitle: Create an account with the same trust-aware flow used in operations-grade authentication.
auth_security.passkey_prompt: Passkey assertion challenge is ready. Continue to verify device-bound credentials.
auth_security.passkey_wave1_body: Passkey WebAuthn verification is enabled in the next wave. Use a server-issued one-time code instead. In development, the API prints the OTP to the server log when the challenge starts.
auth_security.social_prompt: Choose a federated provider to continue.
auth_security.panel_description: Review trust posture, active sessions, and authentication factors.
auth_security.panel_error: Security data could not be loaded.

placeholder.title: Sign in
placeholder.body: Authentication is not wired yet. This screen is a transitional route outside the ERP shell.

not_found.title: 404 — Page not found
not_found.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

route_error.title: Something went wrong
route_error.description: This screen hit an error. You can try again or return to the workspace.

outlet_error.title: This section failed to render
outlet_error.description: Try again or return to the workspace. If this keeps happening, contact support.

root_error.title: Something went wrong
root_error.description: The app hit an error. You can try again, go home, or reload the page.

empty.default_description: There are no items to show. Adjust filters or check back later.

api_session.title: API session not recognized
api_session.body: The browser session does not match the API (HTTP {{status}}). For local development, leave VITE_BETTER_AUTH_BASE_URL unset so Better Auth uses /api/auth on the same origin, and run pnpm --filter @afenda/api dev. Cookies from remote Neon Auth are not sent to localhost.

identity_bridge.title: Identity bridge missing
identity_bridge.body: No Afenda identity link for this account (HTTP {{status}}). Sign-up hooks must use the same DATABASE_URL as apps/api, and identity_links must exist (ADR-0004).

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.body: The API refused this request (HTTP {{status}}) for a reason other than the identity bridge. Check roles, tenant access, or server logs.

api_unavailable.title: API unavailable
api_unavailable.body: The BFF returned HTTP {{status}}. Start @afenda/api on the port Vite proxies to (default 3001). If the Vite terminal shows ECONNREFUSED, the API process is not running.

network.title: Cannot reach API
network.body: Network or timeout error — the API may be stopped, unreachable, or slow. Start pnpm --filter @afenda/api dev and confirm the dev server proxy target (VITE_API_URL).

unknown.title: Workspace scope failed to load
unknown.body: Could not load tenant scope (HTTP {{status}}). Retry, sign out, or verify DATABASE_URL and Better Auth configuration.

scope_lineage.switcher_placeholder: Your allowed options will appear here when scope is connected to the API.

widgets.empty_description: Use Widgets (+) on the rail to show navigation items.

generic.unauthorized: You are not allowed to perform this action.
generic.validationFailed: The action could not be completed because the input is invalid.
generic.invariantFailed: The action violated a required system invariant.
generic.notFound: The requested resource could not be found.
generic.conflict: The action could not be completed because of a conflicting state.
